entities.description: som tl3588     is a product mentioned in the text as a core board with a dxf file associated with it
dxf    is a file type mentioned in the text as being associated with the som tl3588
tl3588 evm         is a product mentioned in the text as an evaluation board schematic for the tl3588

relations.description: the som tl3588     is associated with a dxf file  indicating a file format used for the product
the som tl3588     is related to the tl3588 evm          suggesting a connection between the core board and the evaluation board schematic
the tl3588 evm         is a specific instance of an evaluation board schematic file type
